channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigeria must generate 100GW of electricity to drive industrial growth
item.description: Experts don yan say if Nigeria wan really grow industrially and transform e economy, the country need generate at least 100 gigawatts (GW) of electricity. This call come during the launch of the Green...

item.title: Supreme Court to examine ED petition challenging anticipatory bail of West Bengal coal scam accused
item.description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday, 12th May 2026, agreed to hear the Enforcement Directorate’s (ED) plea challenging the anticipatory bail granted to Anup Majee, alleged to be the key orchestrator of the i...

item.title: Western Cape Storms Displace Thousands and Claim Three Lives
item.description: Severe storms have hit the Western Cape, leaving three people dead and over 41,000 displaced across 26 informal settlements. Nomabhaso Veli, a 50-year-old grandmother from Khayelitsha, fled her floode...

item.title: Climate shocks cause huge annual losses for Tanzanian agriculture
item.description: The Tanzania Agricultural Development Bank (TADB) has raised alarm over the heavy financial losses faced by the country's agriculture sector due to frequent climate shocks. Extreme weather events like...

item.title: Authorities Investigate Hantavirus Cases Linked to Cruise Ship Departing from Ushuaia, Argentina
item.description: Authorities are investigating a hantavirus outbreak linked to the Dutch cruise ship MV Hondius, which has resulted in eight cases and three deaths. The ship's last port of call was Ushuaia, Argentina,...

item.title: Hyderabad Opens Centre to Simulate Prison Life Experience
item.description: The city of Hyderabad has recently introduced a unique initiative—a Prison Experience Centre—where citizens can experience the day-to-day life of a prisoner. The centre offers participants the opportu...

item.title: The Rolling Stones announce tracklist for new album 'Foreign Tongues'
item.description: The Rolling Stones have announced the tracklist for their upcoming 25th studio album, 'Foreign Tongues', set for release on 10th July via Polydor/Universal Music. The record features 14 tracks, includ...

item.title: Why Suspending the Federal Gas Tax Would Only Slightly Reduce Gas Prices
item.description: With gasoline prices averaging over $4.50 per gallon in mid-May 2026, President Donald Trump proposed suspending the federal gas tax, which is 18.4 cents per gallon for gasoline and 24.3 cents for die...

item.title: Potential Impact of a Sifuna-Kalonzo Ticket on Kenya's 2027 Opposition Strategy
item.description: Kenya's opposition faces a major challenge ahead of the 2027 General Election: winning is not just about numbers. Historically, Kenyan politics relies on emotional connection, perception, coalition-bu...

item.title: Zanzibar Government Plans New Health Worker Recruitment to Reduce Staff Shortages
item.description: Zanzibar President Dr Hussein Ali Mwinyi has announced that his government will issue new employment permits in the upcoming financial year for the health sector and other important areas. This move a...

item.title: Government Plans New 1.2 Trillion Muhimbili National Hospital for Advanced Healthcare
item.description: The Tanzanian government is set to transform the health sector by building a new Muhimbili National Hospital at a cost of 1.2 trillion Tanzanian shillings. Health Minister Mohamed Mchengerwa announced...

item.title: DPWH begins reconstruction of substandard flood control structures in Calumpit, Bulacan
item.description: The Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) has begun demolishing deteriorated and substandard flood control structures along the Bagbag River in Calumpit, Bulacan. This initiative follows a di...

item.title: Community bond formed following a tragic accident
item.description: In a remarkable story from Barrie, Ontario, a tragic motorcycling accident unexpectedly led to a lasting friendship. The incident, initially a devastating event for those involved, ultimately brought ...

item.title: Joshua Garcia highlights his favorite Morocco-inspired scenes in 'Love Is Never Gone'
item.description: Joshua Garcia, the popular Filipino actor, recently shared his top three favorite scenes from the hit TV series 'Love Is Never Gone'. What makes these scenes particularly special, according to Garcia,...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi raises objections on CBI Director appointment citing biased selection process
item.description: On Tuesday, Rahul Gandhi publicly expressed his dissent regarding the ongoing process for selecting the next Director of the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI). He communicated his concerns to Prim...

item.title: Dar es Salaam to host three-session Holy Spirit gathering in June
item.description: Dar es Salaam is preparing for a special spiritual event that will happen in June, organised in three separate sessions to give participants a deeper encounter with the Holy Spirit. The gathering is e...

item.title: Texas Tech Law Student Denied Preliminary Injunction in Case Over Comments About Charlie Kirk
item.description: A Trump-appointed federal judge in North Texas has denied a preliminary injunction requested by Texas Tech law student Ellie Mae Fisher. Fisher had been investigated by Texas Tech, a public university...

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship prompts extended quarantine for returning passengers
item.description: An outbreak of hantavirus aboard the cruise ship MV Hondius has led to strict quarantine measures for passengers returning to Australia and other countries. Around 150 people were aboard the vessel wh...

item.title: India raises concerns over China's support to Pakistan during last year’s conflict
item.description: On Tuesday, India subtly criticised China for providing support to Pakistan during the four-day conflict in May 2025. External Affairs Ministry spokesperson, Randhir Jaiswal, emphasised that responsib...

item.title: Investigation into Nancy Guthrie's Disappearance Shows Progress
item.description: Nancy Guthrie, aged 84 and mother of NBC's Today Show co-host Savannah Guthrie, has been missing for 100 days. She disappeared from her Tucson home on January 31, 2026, and authorities believe she was...
